title: President Suspends Habeas Corpus by Executive Order

violations.summary: President suspends the privilege of the writ of habeas corpus by executive order. This power belongs exclusively to Congress under Article III Section 5.7 and may not be exercised by the President alone.

satisfied_duties.duty: submit the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
satisfied_duties.outcome: submitted the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly

satisfied_duties.duty: void the unlawful executive suspension of habeas corpus
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the executive suspension of habeas corpus; only Congress may suspend the writ under Article III Section 5.7

satisfied_duties.duty: approve or reject the emergency declaration
satisfied_duties.outcome: approved the emergency declaration following court-ordered scheduling

ai_summary.primary_violation: President suspends the privilege of the writ of habeas corpus by executive order. This power belongs exclusively to Congress under Article III Section 5.7 and may not be exercised by the President alone.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
